results.name: ViewLive page loads

results.name: ChallengeDetail page loads
results.reasoning: L2 FAIL: The main content area shows only a loading spinner in the center with no additional context or content. This appears to be a stuck loading state rather than a functional challenge detail page or proper error handling for a fake challenge ID.

results.name: Terms page loads
results.reasoning: Terms of Service page displays correctly with all required elements: shield icon in red header, 'User Agreement and Legal Waiver' subtitle, 'Last Updated: February 14, 2026' date, yellow legal notice card with warning icon, and terms content sections including 'Acceptance of Terms' and 'Assumption of Risk' with proper text content. The layout is properly formatted and functional.

results.name: Guidelines page loads
results.reasoning: Community Guidelines page displays correctly with all required elements: book icon in header, red gradient banner with title 'Community Guidelines', subtitle 'Building a positive and safe sports community', last updated date, 'Our Mission' section with mission statement, and 'What SportHub Is For' section with comprehensive bullet points listing allowed activities. All content is properly formatted and visible.

results.name: Return to Feed from remaining pages
results.reasoning: Feed page is working correctly with real content - shows user stories at top with profile pictures, functional post creation area, category filters (For You, Following, All, Basketball, Soccer, Football), and actual posts with user content including Marcus Silva's soccer post with image, text, timestamp, and follow button. All UI elements are properly styled and functional in the dark theme.
